content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "The Child and Sequence". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/438/problem/D?locale=en
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers representing the sequence.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of operations required to make the sequence non-decreasing.

solution.approach: Use a greedy algorithm to find the minimum number of operations required to make the sequence non-decreasing.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
count = 0
for i in range(1, n):
    if a[i] < a[i - 1]:
        count += 1
print(count)
